resumeText:
Experienced Backend Engineer specializing in designing and building high-throughput REST and GraphQL APIs using Python and FastAPI. Proficient with PostgreSQL, Redis, and message queues such as Kafka, complemented by hands-on experience with Docker, Kubernetes, and AWS. Dedicated to writing clean code, enhancing system observability, and ensuring scalable systems, with a strong background in CI/CD practices through GitHub Actions.
Software Developer at RELI Group Inc., Oct 2025 - Present
Engineered production-grade microservice platforms using Python, FastAPI, SQL, Docker, and AWS EKS, focusing on API design and data modeling for horizontally scalable, low-latency data pipelines handling large-scale workloads.
Drove system reliability and observability via Prometheus, Grafana, and CloudWatch, cutting incident response times by 40% and improving uptime to 99.99% through advanced monitoring and alerting.
Software Developer Intern at RELI Group Inc., Feb 2025 - Sept 2025
Designed a Contract Intelligence Platform leveraging Spring Boot, Redis, Kafka, and Hugging Face Transformers to facilitate over 1,000 real-time document inferences per day with significantly reduced query latency.
Established container-native CI/CD pipelines through GitHub Actions and Jenkins, enabling zero-downtime deployments and enhanced telemetry on Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS).
Software Engineer at Acmesia Consultants LLP, May 2022 - July 2024
Developed high-throughput Node.js microservices with PostgreSQL, utilizing message queues and asynchronous processing to achieve sub-100ms response times for analytics dashboards.
Spearheaded DevOps practices through Agile, TDD, and enhanced CI/CD pipelines, accelerating feature delivery by 45% through comprehensive testing and performance tuning.
SKILLS
Backend: Python, FastAPI, Node.js, Spring Boot, Django, Flask, PostgreSQL, Redis, GraphQL, Kafka
Cloud / DevOps: Docker, Kubernetes, AWS (EKS, Lambda, S3, RDS, CloudWatch, API Gateway), Azure (AKS, SQL), GitHub Actions, Jenkins, Prometheus, Grafana
AI / ML: LangChain, FAISS, Hugging Face, OpenAI API, spaCy, RAG, Embeddings
Languages: JavaScript, TypeScript, Java, Go, SQL, C++, Ruby, PHP
jobDescription: We are looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to join our platform team. You will design and build high-throughput REST and GraphQL APIs using Python and FastAPI. Experience with PostgreSQL, Redis, and message queues (Kafka or SQS) is required. You should be comfortable with Docker, Kubernetes, and AWS. CI/CD experience with GitHub Actions is a plus. We value clean code, observability, and systems that scale.
